sections.sectionTitle: Esther in Ama mite-a' ding Thumsak ding Kam Ciam

verses.text: Mordekai in hih thupiang teng a theih ciangin a puan balkekin puanhampi silhin vut kibuak a, nakpi takin a kap kawmin khuasungah vak kawikawi hi
Puanhampi silh kawmpi-in kongpi-ah kuamah kilutsak lo ahih manin kumpi inn kongpi panin a kimuhna mun ciangah pai hi
Kumpipa' thupiakna a tun'na gam Jew mite' omna khempeuhah nakpi taka thumna leh tauna, antan'na, kahna, leh dip-humna om hi. Mi a tamzaw in puanhampi silhin vut lakah lum uh hi

Esther' nasem numeite leh a innsungmangte hong pai-in ama kiang-ah tua thu a gen ciangun kumpinu in lamdangsa mahmah hi. A puanhampi a laihna dingin amah in Mordekai-a' ding puante khak a, ahih hangin Mordekai in tuate na sanglo hi

Tua ciangin Esther in ama na a sem dingin a kiseh, kumpipa innsungmangte lak panin Hathak a kici mipa samin hih thu pen bang hi a, bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in Mordekai tung panin thu a va kan dingin a sawl hi
Kumpi inn kongpi mai-a om khuapi kongzing tualpi-a om Mordekai kiangah Hathak va pai a
Mordekai in ama tunga thupiangte khempeuh leh Jew mite sukmangna dingin kumpipa' sumkholna-ah Haman in piak dinga a sum ciamzah thute khempeuh ama kiangah na gen hi

Amaute a kisukmangna dingin Susa khua panin a kihawmkhia lai dal khat zong Mordekai in ama tungah pia a, amah in Esther tungah tua lai na pia-in a thu a na gentelna ding leh, kumpipa kiangah Esther na pai-in ama mipihte-a' dingin a na thumsak ding zong a sawl hi
Hathak zong ciahin Mordekai' thugen teng Esther kiangah va gen hi
Tua ciangin Esther in Hathak mah sawlkikin Mordekai' tungah thu zasak a

“Numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin saplohpi-in mi khat peuhpeuh kumpipa' omna inn sungah a va lut leh upadi khat bek om a, tua pen, thah ding ahi hi; kumpipa in ama lamah a kham kumpi ciangkhut a na zan leh tua mipa suakta bek ding ahihna thu kumpipa' nasemte leh ama ukna gam mi khempeuh in a theih ciat uh ahi hi. Tu-in kumpipa kiangah a pai dingin hong kisaploh zawh ni sawmthum bang pha ta hi,” a ci hi
Tua hi a, Esther' thugen teng Mordekai tungah kigen hi
Tua ciangin Mordekai in Esther a dawn'kikna thu amahmah puasak kik a, “Kumpi inn sungah na omna hangin Jew mi khempeuh lak panin nang a suakta tuan dingin kingaihsun kei in

Hih bang hunin bangmah hihloin na omcip leh, Jew mite' suahtakna ding leh noptuamna ding thu mundang khat pan hong piang veve ding a, nangmah leh na innkuanpihte na simang ding uh hi. Hih kumpi inn na tun'na pen hih bang huna mah dinga a tung na hih mel zong kua'n thei ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Esther in Mordekai a dawn'na lai amah puasak leuleu a

“Pai-in Susa khua sunga om Jew mi khempeuh khawm in la, keimah ngaihsutna-in an na tang un. A sun a zan ciloin ni thum sung an nelo, tui dawnloin na om un. Na tan' uh mah bangin kei leh ka nasem numeite in zong ka na tang ding uh hi. Tua khit ciangin ngeina ahihloh hangin kumpipa kiangah ka va pai ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Mordekai pai-in Esther' sawl bang teekteekin a gamta hi.
